capture_method: From inside the detached worktree, one subshell wrote the complete identity, clean-state, target-absence, tool-version, command, and gate stdout/stderr directly to the raw log. The outer zsh wrapper stored the subshell exit status and UTC start/end timestamps in a separate result file; the retained exit status is not a tee or pipeline status. Only this final fresh-target status-0 capture is retained.
terminal_markers: All offline P0-R gates passed. (TLA+ check runs in CI: CL-FORMAL-01.)
scope_limitations: The raw transcript directly proves the exact commit, tree, worktree path, empty Git status, absence of a pre-existing target directory, tool versions, and offline checks configured by tools/p0r-exit-gate.sh at the qualified commit.
The TLA+ model check is represented by the separately retained exact GitHub formal-workflow evidence.
A successful qualification run does not establish release readiness or product correctness beyond its named checks.
